creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #7)
Yes, I have it:

 $ sudo find / -name "libjli*"
/usr/local/openjdk7/jre/lib/amd64/jli/libjli.so
/usr/local/openjdk8/lib/amd64/jli/libjli.so
/usr/local/openjdk8/jre/lib/amd64/jli/libjli.so
/usr/local/openjdk8-jre/lib/amd64/jli/libjli.so
/usr/local/share/geogebra/jre1.7.0_45-i686/lib/i386/jli/libjli.so
